message:
feat(connectors): accept explicit file paths as scan roots for Amp and Gemini connectors

Both connectors previously required directory roots — passing an explicit
session file path would fail the looks_like_root check and produce zero
results. This blocked the watch-once feature in cass which passes
individual changed file paths as scan roots.

amp.rs:
- Update looks_like_root closure to accept a file path if
  is_amp_log_file() returns true (checks for thread-*.json naming)
- New test scan_accepts_explicit_amp_log_file_root verifying that a
  single Amp log file can be used as the scan root

gemini.rs:
- Extract is_session_file() helper that checks for session-*.json
  naming inside a chats/ parent directory
- Update session_files() to short-circuit and return vec![path] when
  the root is a file that passes is_session_file()
- Update looks_like_root closure to accept file paths via
  is_session_file() and to detect directories containing session files
  via a read_dir scan
- New test scan_accepts_explicit_session_file_root verifying that a
  single Gemini session file can be used as the scan root

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
